landing.featured_subtitle: Our best-selling dairy products, delivered daily
landing.testimonial_1_text: The milk quality is outstanding. Fresh every morning and delivery is always on time. Our family has been buying from Alam Dairy for 3 years now.
landing.testimonial_2_text: The ghee is absolutely pure and fragrant. I've tried many brands but Alam Dairy's ghee tastes just like homemade. Highly recommend!
landing.testimonial_3_text: I bought cattle from Alam Dairy for Qurbani. The cattle were healthy and vet-certified. Very transparent and trustworthy business.
landing.cta_subtitle: Fresh dairy straight from our farm to your doorstep. Order today and taste the Alam Dairy difference.
landing.story_p1: Our journey began in 2015 with a small cattle shed in Madaripur. We still work the same way: milked at dawn, delivered the same day.
landing.story_p2: Three generations have built this farm, and we know every cow by name. Pure milk is our family's word of honour.
landing.farmers_note: I still milk the herd the way my father taught me.
landing.home_band_subtitle: Our herds graze on open pasture and our cold chain starts before sunrise so freshness travels with every bottle.

about.hero_title: Honest Dairy, From Our Family to Yours
about.hero_subtitle: We are a family-run dairy farm in Madaripur, producing pure milk the slow, honest way since 2015.
about.mission_title: Pure Milk Is a Promise, Not a Product
about.mission_p1: Every morning before sunrise, our herd is milked by hands that know each cow by name. No powders, no preservatives, no shortcuts — just milk the way nature intended it.
about.mission_p2: From a single cattle shed we have grown into one of the region's most trusted dairy names, serving thousands of families and hundreds of fellow farmers across Bangladesh.
about.value1_desc: Unadulterated milk, tested for quality every single day before it leaves the farm.
about.value2_desc: Healthy, happy cows on open pasture — vet-inspected, well-fed and never rushed.
about.value3_desc: We pay fair prices to partner farmers and share what we know about better dairying.
about.value4_desc: We hire locally, train the next generation, and give back to the villages we call home.
about.band_quote: A farm is not a factory. It is a family that happens to have four hundred hooves.
about.people_desc: Our team works from one farm in Madaripur — from herdsmen and milkers to veterinarians, cheesemakers and delivery riders. Many have been with us for years.
about.cta_title: Come See the Farm for Yourself
about.cta_text: The best way to trust your dairy is to meet it. Book a farm visit or browse our story.

story.hero_title: From One Shed to a Thousand Doorsteps
story.hero_subtitle: The journey began in 2015 with a single cattle shed in Madaripur. This is the story of the decade that shaped us into a trusted family dairy.
story.intro_title: It Started With One Cow Named Lokkhi
story.intro_p1: In 2015, Md. Alam started the farm in Madaripur with a single Sahiwal cow and began selling milk door to door on a bicycle. Neighbours started calling before dawn to reserve their share.
story.intro_p2: Over the years, the farm grew steadily — a shed became a barn, a bicycle became a van, and quality stayed non-negotiable.
story.m2015_text: The second generation joins full-time. The old barn is rebuilt with proper ventilation, drainage and open stalls for a herd of fifty.
story.m2016_text: A resident veterinary programme begins — every animal inspected weekly, every litre of milk quality-tested daily.
story.m2017_text: Our first processing unit opens, bottling pasteurized milk within hours of milking and unlocking yogurt, ghee and butter production.
story.m2018_text: Cold-chain vans start same-day home delivery across Dhaka. The morning milk run that began on a bicycle now reaches hundreds of doorsteps.
story.m2020_text: Lockdown pushes us online overnight. Phone orders, bKash and Nagad payments keep fresh milk moving when the city stands still.
story.m2021_text: We introduce a dedicated Sahiwal A2 herd and premium buffalo milk line — traditional breeds, prized milk.
story.m2022_text: What we learned, we started sharing: cattle, feed, veterinary supplies and equipment for fellow farmers across the country.
story.m2024_text: Biogas from manure now cooks for the farm kitchen, solar panels power the chillers, and glass bottles replace single-use plastic.
story.m2026_text: 2,500+ families, 100+ products, one promise unchanged since 2015: pure milk, milked at dawn, delivered the same day.
story.legacy_quote: My father sold milk from a bicycle. We deliver from an app. The milk has not changed.
story.cta_title: Be Part of the Next Chapter

farms.hero_subtitle: Three working farms across greater Dhaka — open pasture, clean barns and herds that live well.
farms.intro_title: Good Milk Starts With Good Ground
farms.intro_text: Each of our farms is chosen for its water, grass and air. Cows graze on open pasture in the dry season and eat home-grown fodder in the monsoon — nothing anonymous ever enters the feed trough.
farms.farm1_desc: The original farmstead and our largest dairy herd. Home to the milking parlor, processing unit and the farm shop.
farms.farm2_desc: Forty acres of open grazing where our heifers and A2 Sahiwal herd spend most of the year on grass.
farms.farm3_desc: Napier grass, maize and seasonal fodder grown for the herds — plus our cattle-rearing and quarantine facility.
farms.band_quote: Grass, water, patience. Everything else is detail.
farms.visit_text: We host school groups, families and fellow farmers every Friday and Saturday morning. Meet the herd, watch the milking, taste milk still warm from the parlor.

gallery.hero_title: Life at the Farm, in Pictures
gallery.hero_subtitle: The herd, the land, the hands that do the work — a walk through our days in photographs.

blog.hero_subtitle: Stories, seasonal updates and honest advice on dairy, cattle and country life.

sustainability.hero_title: Farming That Gives Back to the Land
sustainability.hero_subtitle: A dairy farm borrows everything from the soil, the water and the herd. We work hard to return the favour.
sustainability.intro_text: On a well-run farm nothing is waste — manure becomes energy and fertilizer, whey feeds the calves, rainwater fills the troughs. We design every process on the farm to feed the next one.
sustainability.pillar1_desc: Manure from the herd runs a biogas plant that fuels the farm kitchen and heats water for the dairy.
sustainability.pillar2_desc: Rooftop solar keeps the milk chillers running through load-shedding without a drop of diesel.
sustainability.pillar3_desc: Returnable glass bottles on Dhaka delivery routes have replaced tens of thousands of plastic pouches.
sustainability.pillar4_desc: Rainwater harvesting and recycled wash-water cut the farm's groundwater use by a third.
sustainability.pillar5_desc: Napier grass and maize grown on our own land shortens the feed chain and keeps soil covered year-round.
sustainability.pillar6_desc: Open stalls, shade trees, and pasture time — healthy cows need fewer medicines and give better milk.
sustainability.band_quote: We do not inherit the farm from our parents; we borrow it from our calves.
sustainability.commit2: Zero single-use plastic across all packaging
sustainability.commit4: Tree cover on one in every five acres we farm

certifications.hero_subtitle: Independent inspections and certifications that back up every bottle we sell.
certifications.intro_text: Trust is earned in the barn and proven on paper. Our farm, processing unit and products are regularly inspected and certified by the relevant authorities of Bangladesh.
certifications.cert1_desc: All products are certified halal, from feed sourcing through processing and packaging.
certifications.cert2_desc: Our pasteurized milk, ghee and dairy products carry BSTI standard marks.
certifications.cert3_desc: The herd is vaccinated, dewormed and inspected under a registered veterinary programme.
certifications.cert4_desc: Processing follows documented hygiene protocols with daily quality testing at every step.
certifications.note_text: Copies of all current certificates are available on request — ask at the farm shop or message us anytime.

contact.hero_subtitle: Orders, farm visits, bulk supply or just a question about milk — we answer fast.
